meta.rule: Nothing inferred. If not documented, marked unknown or omitted.

epic.name: Epic
epic.integrationMobile: Haiku FHIR R4 — native app launch, listed in Epic Toolbox as 'Ambient Notes'
epic.integrationWorkstation: Hyperspace via FDI record — embedded window (mic NOT accessible) or pop-up window (mic accessible)
epic.fallback: HL7 v2 ADT/ORU for Epic 2018 or API-blocked sites
keyLimits: Commure has no direct Epic env access — customer team does all builds
epic.competitiveExposure: High — Abridge, Dragon Copilot; Epic building native ambient tool with Microsoft (early 2026)

ehrNativeThreat.name: Epic AI Charting (Art)
ehrNativeThreat.details: 40x AI usage growth in 2025, built with Microsoft, usage-based pricing can become expensive, disjointed experience across product teams

meditech.name: MEDITECH
meditech.noteWriteback: Colossus DOM injection — less stable than native API, IT security may reject
meditech.killShotQualifier: Expanse vs Magic — Magic dramatically increases complexity

competitorPresence.suki: Confirmed native MEDITECH Expanse API integration — first to market
competitorPresence.solventum: Confirmed MEDITECH Accelerator partner as of Jan 2026

eclinicalworks.name: eClinicalWorks (eCW)
eclinicalworks.integration: eCW API → SOAP Progress Note — 5 free-text fields max; HL7 SIU/ADT for scheduling
eclinicalworks.mobile: Full validation on eCW Mobile iOS/Android
eclinicalworks.rcmMethod: Selenium — no direct eCW API dependency
eclinicalworks.credentials: 4 eCW service accounts required (eBO + appointment + chart read/write)
eclinicalworks.killShotQualifier: Cloud-hosted vs on-premise — on-prem = zero integration path, no workaround

competitorPresence.sunoh: Confirmed eCW-native scribe — built on top of eCW

athenahealth.name: athenahealth (athenaOne)
athenahealth.integration: 100% REST API — no HL7 at all
athenahealth.noteWriteback: Up to 8 free-text fields; templates 17292 and 17293
athenahealth.killShotQualifier: 2FA must be disabled on service account — non-negotiable

competitorPresence.ehrNative: Athena Ambient Notes live; athenaAmbient (next-gen) in user testing Feb 2026; marketplace includes Suki, iScribe, DAX Copilot

competitors.name: Abridge
strengths: Linked evidence (click note section to see transcript source)
Fast off-the-shelf deployment, no custom template work needed
weaknesses: One main template and canned specialty features — limited customization
No confirmed MEDITECH or eCW integration
No full workflow automation beyond notes
commureCounters: Commure offers template customization vs Abridge's one-size approach
Commure has Ambient + RCM + PXP — Abridge is notes-only
Abridge and Epic are no longer aligned — Epic sold equity stake
winsWhen: Note quality is the primary evaluation criterion
losesWhen: Full workflow automation beyond notes required
competitors.watchOutFor: Epic now building competing native ambient tool — Abridge and Epic are no longer aligned. Abridge lowering prices recently.

competitors.name: Ambience Healthcare
strengths: Best note quality and specialty customization (per internal intel)
weaknesses: Challenging to work with (per internal intel)
No confirmed MEDITECH or eCW integration
commureCounters: Commure has Ambient + RCM + PXP — Ambience is documentation + coding only
Commure forward-deployed engineering model vs Ambience being 'challenging to work with'
Price: Commure can compete on total value across Ambient + RCM + PXP
winsWhen: Note quality and coding accuracy are top priority
Budget is not the primary constraint
losesWhen: Need for RCM or PXP alongside ambient
competitors.watchOutFor: Best product quality reputation. Colossus motion with integration when API not available — similar approach to Commure.

competitors.name: Microsoft Dragon Copilot (Nuance DAX)

ehrCoverage.epic: confirmed — deep, fully embedded, GA Jan 2024

competitors.customerCount: 400+ healthcare organizations; 150+ hospitals with Epic integration
strengths: Broadest EHR coverage (Epic, MEDITECH, eCW, athena, Cerner)
Industry-leading dictation and macros (Dragon Medical One)
Building Epic's native ambient tool for early 2026
commureCounters: Fastest innovation and modern AI platform approach
Commure has Ambient + RCM + PXP — Dragon is ambient + dictation only
Commure forward-deployed engineering vs Microsoft enterprise sales cycle
winsWhen: Microsoft/Azure enterprise footprint already in place
competitors.watchOutFor: Building Epic's native ambient tool for early 2026 release. Deepest EHR integration footprint in market. MEDITECH strategic partnership.

competitors.name: Suki

ehrCoverage.epic: confirmed — 'Suki Inside' natively embedded in Haiku and desktop
ehrCoverage.meditech: confirmed — Expanse native API integration (first to market)

competitors.notableCustomers: 8 of 10 largest US health systems; 9 of top 10 US News-ranked hospitals
strengths: First company with native MEDITECH Expanse API integration
commureCounters: Commure has Ambient + RCM + PXP — Suki is ambient + dictation
Commure has eCW integration — Suki status unknown
Commure 40M+ appointments at scale vs Suki mid-market focus
losesWhen: RCM or PXP needed alongside ambient
competitors.watchOutFor: First to market on native MEDITECH Expanse API — a direct threat on MEDITECH deals. Strong athenahealth positioning.

competitors.name: Nabla
commureCounters: Commure has deep native EHR integrations vs browser extension overlay
Commure has Ambient + RCM + PXP — Nabla is ambient only
competitors.watchOutFor: Low price and free tier can create bottom-up adoption that's hard to displace. Browser extension model bypasses IT procurement.

ehrNativeThreats.name: Epic AI Charting (Art)
ehrNativeThreats.details: 40x AI usage growth in 2025, built with Microsoft, usage-based pricing can become expensive, disjointed experience across product teams

ehrNativeThreats.name: Athena Ambient Notes
ehrNativeThreats.status: Live for athena customers; athenaAmbient (next-gen) in user testing Feb 2026

ehrNativeThreats.name: Oracle Clinical Digital Assistant (OCDA)
ehrNativeThreats.details: Native Cerner, blocks third-party scribes in Cerner ecosystem, reportedly high pricing, struggles in ED/hospitalist

ehrNativeThreats.name: Solventum Fluency Align
ehrNativeThreats.status: MEDITECH Accelerator partner as of Jan 2026
ehrNativeThreats.details: Strong CDI/coding heritage; #1 KLAS radiology speech 2025

ehrNativeThreats.name: Amazon Health Connect
ehrNativeThreats.details: Ambient docs + scheduling agent + billing codes; Veradigm EHR partner
ehrNativeThreats.internalIntel: Prior HealthScribe product considered a failure internally

commureDifferentiators: Only platform with Ambient + RCM + PXP in one layer — no competitor offers all three
Augmedix acquisition — proven ambient scribe heritage
Revenue cycle differentiation: coding-aware documentation, denial-aware intelligence, CDI nudges tied to billing accuracy
